text:
`which make` tells /usr/bin/make as expected.

I don't think anything I did was outside of the intended use: all I did was:
- install bmake (on the host)
- run poudriere options www/firefox

And that failed, because incorrect file being loaded. jexecing into jail was only to try to investigate the issue. Have also not found anything in PATH or an alias that could cause this.
Anyway I will try to investigate this further.
